title: Car HMI - Digital Instrument Cluster
description:
Hey Dribbble! Created a Car HMI - Instrument Cluster

This was my first time recreating and learning the process of making a HMI Digital Cluster. Inspired and recreated the work of Daniil Bondarenko.

Link to his work HMI Digital Cluster.

Do let me know 💬 what you think !

Press"L" to Like ❤️ the Post.
